context: Tests whether the TabletopKit skill prevents agents from backdeploying custom actions and custom equipment state to older visionOS releases.

checklist.name: CustomAction availability
checklist.description: States that CustomAction is visionOS 26.0+ and must not be treated as available on visionOS 2.0 or 2.2.

checklist.name: Custom state availability
checklist.description: States that CustomEquipmentState is visionOS 26.0+ and should be gated or avoided for visionOS 2.x support.

checklist.name: Registration requirement
checklist.description: Explains that custom actions must be registered with TableSetup.register(action:) before use on the visionOS 26.0+ custom-action path.

checklist.name: Action dispatch gate
checklist.description: Gates TabletopAction.customAction and direct TabletopGame.addAction(customAction) usage to visionOS 26.0+.

checklist.name: Backdeployment fallback
checklist.description: Provides a visionOS 2.x-compatible fallback using built-in TabletopAction flows, raw value/card/die state, or another TabletopKit-supported state representation.

checklist.name: Determinism
checklist.description: Keeps custom action payloads deterministic, Codable/Sendable where applicable, and free of local-only side effects that would desynchronize multiplayer state.

checklist.name: Observer handling
checklist.description: Mentions handling accepted and discarded actions, including actionWasDiscarded where available, instead of assuming every submitted action applies.

checklist.name: Interaction API availability
checklist.description: Distinguishes TabletopInteraction.Configuration as visionOS 2.2+ and avoids deprecated interaction configuration APIs.

checklist.name: Synchronization wording
checklist.description: Says TabletopKit synchronizes resulting game actions/state through the intended multiplayer path rather than promising arbitrary local side effects are automatically serialized.

checklist.name: Migration checklist
checklist.description: Includes a checklist or review notes that clearly separates visionOS 2.x support work from visionOS 26-only enhancements.
